headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -75.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 79% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 130 quotes and 91 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 53.5 sits in the upper third of the 95-day range, indicating elevated but not extreme levels.

• Fears improved significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism remains deeply negative across the period.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
